PlayerID.description: The unique PlayerID of the player as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

Season.description: The NFL season of the ownership info

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=AllStar).

Week.description: The NFL week of the game (regular season: 1 to 18; preseason: 0 to 4; postseason: 1 to 4). Note: seasons after 2021 will have only 3 preseason weeks

Position.description: The player's fantasy football position. Possible values: QB; RB; WR; TE; DL; LB; DB; K; P; OL

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the team that the player is on

TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team that the player is on. Note: If the player is a free agent; this field is NULL

OwnershipPercentage.description: Player's ownership percentage on NFL.com fantasy leagues during this week

DeltaOwnershipPercentage.description: Player's change in ownership percentage on NFL.com fantasy leagues during this week

StartPercentage.description: Player's starting lineup percentage on NFL.com fantasy leagues during this week

DeltaStartPercentage.description: Player's change in starting lineup percentage on NFL.com fantasy leagues during this week
